presentationContext.title: Strategic Technology Recommendations
presentationContext.context: Executive briefing on technology modernization strategy. Convert advisory recommendations into actionable presentation slides for CIO review.

data.text: Based on our comprehensive assessment, [Client] should pursue a phased modernization strategy over the next 18 months. Implement cloud-first architecture principles, prioritizing workload migration for non-critical systems in Phase 1. Establish a Cloud Center of Excellence within 90 days to drive adoption and maintain governance standards. The organization should invest approximately 15% of IT budget in modernization initiatives, with expected ROI of 2.5x within 3 years. Ensure executive sponsorship from both IT and business leadership to maintain momentum. Develop a comprehensive change management program targeting 85% user adoption within 6 months of each rollout phase.
